description: The LineTransform component is a transform driver component used to position an object between two points or slots.

fields.Point0: The point in local space to transform from.
fields.Point1: The point in local space to transform to.
fields.Point0Anchor: acts as a slot to offset ``Point0`` in global space.
fields.Point1Anchor: acts as a slot to offset ``Point1`` in global space.
fields.LinePositionType: How to calculate the position on the line using ``LinePoint`` for the slot this component is on.
fields.PlanePositionType: How to calculate the position on the line using ``LinePoint`` for the slot this component is on.
fields.LinePoint: Where on the line specified by ``Point0`` and ``Point1`` in percentage or relative distance that the slot this component is on should be positioned.
fields.OffsetPoint: The offset from the point found by ``LinePoint`` slot this component is on should be.
fields.RotationOffset: The rotation offset from looking along the line.
fields._position: drives the target field with the position found by ``LinePoint`` plus ``OffsetPoint`` rotated by ``RotationOffset`` and "looking down the line rotation" around the point found by ``LinePoint``.
fields._rotation: drives the target field with ``RotationOffset`` and "looking down the line rotation"
fields.AllowRepositioning: Allow grabbing of the slot this component is on to move the object and change ``LinePoint``

usage: Can be used to position an object along a track like a slider.
